---
title : "Radiograf{'i}a Del {{Cambio Social}} En {{Chile}} 2016-2022"
date : "2023-01-01"
author : "Gonzalez, Roberto; Bargsted, Matias; Figueiredo, Ana; Miranda, Daniel; Cerda, Edgardo; Salas-Lewin, Rocio & Delgado"
categories : ["Report"]
publication : " "
publication_short : " "
abstract : "Resultados ELSOC 2016-2021"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Gonzalez, Roberto; Bargsted, Matias; Figueiredo, Ana; Miranda, Daniel; Cerda, Edgardo; Salas-Lewin, Rocio & Delgado (2023). *Radiograf{'i}a Del {{Cambio Social}} En {{Chile}} 2016-2022*.  

:::
